<!--
Apply a `risk:low` / `risk:medium` / `risk:high` label on the right
before submitting.  No label → defaults to `risk:medium`.

  risk:low    — docs, tests, comments, isolated typos
  risk:medium — ordinary features, refactors, bug fixes
  risk:high   — auth, crypto, payments, migrations, public API

See README "Risk levels" for what each one means.
-->
